calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Plaintiff Eric Poer'S Motion To Seal
Off Calendar Aug-06-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ERIC POER's Motion To Seal.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with Local Rule 2.7(B) (courtesy copies). Motion may be reset for a Mon.-Thur. after August 22. Papers shall bear new hearing date.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
